name: FireRed & LeafGreen

completionTypes.name: Obtain all and keep if possible (Living Dex)
completionTypes.desc: Ex: You must own Bulbasaur, Ivysaur, and Venusaur simultaneously. Same for items.

events.name: Deoxys
events.longDesc: Form depends on version: Attack (FireRed), Defense (LeafGreen), Normal (traded to Ruby/Sapphire), Speed (Emerald).

events.name: Jirachi
events.where: Pokémon Colosseum Bonus Disc (US) / Pokémon Channel (PAL)

guide: Play Pokémon FireRed and Pokémon LeafGreen together. Obtain everything available across the two versions using only those two games.

After the Elite Four, register 60 Pokémon and complete Celio's Network Machine (Ruby & Sapphire gems from the Sevii Islands) to unlock the National Dex and trading with Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald/Colosseum/XD.

waresByType.name: Emulator (US)
warnings: FireRed/LeafGreen require the National Dex (defeat the Elite Four, register 60 Pokémon, and complete Celio's Network Machine on the Sevii Islands) before they can trade with Ruby, Sapphire or Emerald.

list.name: Cheat: Permit JP events on US games?
